definitions: A prominent Chinese martial artist, born in 1928, known for his contributions to Yang-style Taijiquan.
The grandson of Yang Chengfu and great-grandson of Yang Jianhou, continuing the legacy of the Yang family's Taijiquan.
examples: Yang Zhen Guo dedicated his life to teaching Taijiquan.
Many students traveled to learn from Yang Zhen Guo.
The teachings of Yang Zhen Guo are highly respected.
